name: ChatGPT
description: The most widely used AI assistant for writing, research, coding, and analysis. Supports image input and web browsing.
longDescription: ChatGPT by OpenAI is the world's leading conversational AI. It can write essays, debug code, answer questions, summarize documents, and much more. The GPT-4o model supports text, image, and voice inputs.

name: Midjourney
description: Generate stunning, photorealistic images and artwork from text prompts. Industry standard for AI image creation.
longDescription: Midjourney produces some of the most beautiful AI-generated images available. Used by designers, artists, and marketers worldwide to create visuals for any project.

name: GitHub Copilot
description: AI pair programmer that suggests code completions and entire functions directly inside VS Code and other editors.
longDescription: GitHub Copilot uses OpenAI Codex to suggest code as you type. It understands context from your file and comments, making it the most popular coding assistant for developers.

name: Notion AI
description: AI writing and summarization built into Notion. Draft documents, summarize notes, and generate action items instantly.
longDescription: Notion AI is embedded directly into the popular workspace app. It can write, edit, summarize, translate, and brainstorm without leaving your notes.

name: Runway ML
description: AI-powered video generation and editing. Create professional videos from text prompts or transform existing footage.
longDescription: Runway is the leading AI video tool used by filmmakers and content creators. Gen-3 Alpha produces high quality short videos from text or image prompts.

name: Perplexity AI
description: AI-powered search engine that gives direct answers with cited sources. Perfect for research and fact-checking.
longDescription: Perplexity combines the power of large language models with real-time web search to provide accurate, sourced answers to any question.

name: Jasper AI
description: Enterprise-grade AI copywriting platform for marketing teams. Generate blog posts, ads, emails, and social content at scale.
longDescription: Jasper is built for marketing teams and agencies. It includes brand voice training, SEO mode, and over 50 writing templates for every content type.

name: ElevenLabs
description: Hyper-realistic AI voice synthesis and cloning. Generate natural-sounding speech in 29 languages from any text.
longDescription: ElevenLabs produces the most realistic AI voices available. Clone any voice with just a few seconds of audio, or use one of hundreds of pre-built voices for narration and dubbing.

name: Cursor
description: AI-first code editor built on VS Code. Chat with your codebase, generate entire files, and fix bugs with one click.
longDescription: Cursor is a fork of VS Code with deep AI integration. It can read your entire codebase and make multi-file edits. The most productive coding environment for AI-assisted development.

name: Claude
description: Anthropic's AI assistant known for thoughtful, nuanced responses. Excellent at long documents, analysis, and coding.
longDescription: Claude by Anthropic is a highly capable AI assistant built with safety in mind. It excels at complex reasoning, long-context documents (up to 200K tokens), and nuanced writing.

name: Descript
description: Edit video and podcast audio by editing the transcript. AI removes filler words, adds captions, and clones your voice.
longDescription: Descript makes video editing as easy as editing a Google Doc. The AI transcribes your audio, lets you delete words to cut footage, and can even overdub mistakes in your own voice.

name: Tableau AI
description: Natural language analytics built into Tableau. Ask questions about your data and get instant visualizations.
longDescription: Tableau AI (formerly Einstein Analytics) lets business users ask data questions in plain English and get instant charts and dashboards without writing SQL.

name: Grammarly
description: AI writing assistant that checks grammar, style, tone, and plagiarism. Works across email, docs, and social media.
longDescription: Grammarly is the most widely used AI writing assistant. It checks spelling, grammar, clarity, engagement, and delivery, and now includes a full generative AI writing feature.

name: Synthesia
description: Create professional AI avatar videos from text scripts. No camera, no crew — just type and publish.
longDescription: Synthesia lets businesses create training videos, product demos, and marketing content using realistic AI avatars. Supports 130+ languages and 160+ avatars.

name: Otter.ai
description: AI meeting assistant that transcribes, summarizes, and generates action items from your Zoom, Teams, and Meet calls.
longDescription: Otter joins your meetings automatically, transcribes them in real time, highlights key moments, and sends a summary with action items to all participants after the call ends.

name: Stable Diffusion
description: Open-source image generation model you can run locally or via API. Highly customizable with thousands of community models.
longDescription: Stable Diffusion is the most popular open-source image generation model. Run it on your own GPU, fine-tune it on custom datasets, or use it via Stability AI's API.

name: Zapier AI
description: Build AI-powered automations between 6000+ apps without code. Create chatbots and workflows using natural language.
longDescription: Zapier's AI features let you describe automations in plain English and have them built automatically. Create custom AI chatbots connected to your company's tools and data.

name: Copy.ai
description: AI copywriting tool with 90+ templates for ads, emails, product descriptions, and social media posts.
longDescription: Copy.ai helps marketers and entrepreneurs create high-converting copy fast. With GTM AI workflows, it can run entire go-to-market campaigns end to end.

name: Luma AI
description: Generate photorealistic 3D scenes and videos from text or images. Powers Dream Machine for cinematic AI video.
longDescription: Luma AI creates stunning 3D captures and AI-generated videos. Dream Machine by Luma produces highly cinematic, physically accurate video from text prompts.

name: Gemini
description: Google's most capable AI model. Deep integration with Google Workspace, Search, and real-time web access.
longDescription: Gemini Ultra by Google DeepMind is a multimodal AI that handles text, images, audio, and video. It integrates with Gmail, Docs, Drive, and Search for a connected AI experience.
